products.title: Intro Psychic Reading
products.body_html:
Your first step into ancient wisdom. Get a quick overview reading powered by Qi Men Dun Jia (奇門遁甲) — a 4,000-year-old Chinese divination system used by emperors and military strategists.

Includes: Overview + Guidance

Delivered to your email within minutes.

products.title: Love & Relationships Reading
products.body_html:
Deep insights into your love life using three ancient systems:

  • 🔮 QMDJ — Qi Men Dun Jia destiny analysis for relationship timing
  • ⭐ Western Astrology — Venus placement, 7th house analysis
  • 🃏 Tarot — Relationship spread with Celtic Cross

A comprehensive PDF report with timing guidance for your love journey.

Delivered to your email within minutes.

products.title: Career & Purpose Reading
products.body_html:
Strategic guidance for your career path using the same system Chinese emperors used for military strategy:

  • 🔮 QMDJ — Strategic timing analysis, favorable directions, career palace reading
  • ⭐ Western Astrology — Midheaven, 10th house, Saturn return analysis
  • 🃏 Tarot — Career spread with decision guidance

Includes optimal timing windows for career moves, negotiations, and launches.

Delivered to your email within minutes.

products.title: Full Destiny Chart
products.body_html:
The complete picture. Your full destiny chart analyzed across all three systems:

  • 🔮 QMDJ Full Destiny Plate (命盤) — All 9 palaces, 8 doors, 9 stars, Three Wonders & Six Instruments
  • ⭐ Complete Birth Chart — 10 planets, 12 houses, major aspects, dignities
  • 🃏 Full Tarot Spread — 10-card Celtic Cross with Jungian archetypes

Covers: Love, Career, Health, Spiritual Growth, Timing Windows, and Actionable Guidance.

Cross-system theme analysis with confidence scoring.

Comprehensive PDF report delivered to your email within minutes.

products.title: Monthly Mentorship with Jade
products.body_html:
Personal guidance from Jade, every month.

  • 📊 Monthly QMDJ forecast with strategic timing
  • 🔮 Weekly mini-readings tailored to your chart
  • 💬 Direct access via Telegram for quick questions
  • 📅 Quarterly deep-dive destiny chart update
  • 🎯 Personalized action plans based on your goals

Like having a wise spiritual advisor on speed dial.

note: Import via Shopify Admin API or manually create. SKUs used by webhook handler to determine reading type.
